holdings.infoBox: VHT is an equity ETF with a total of 436 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 13.99%, Johnson & Johnson at 8.44%, AbbVie at 6.07%, UnitedHealth Group at 5.44%, and Merck & Co. at 4.63%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Health Care ETF (VHT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI US IMI 25/50 Health Care indexThe fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US healthcare stocks VHT was launched on Jan 26, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.
